# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  enabled: true
  repositories:
    s3-repo:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: backups-bucket
        region: us-west-2
        access_key: ${ES_S3_ACCESS_KEY}
        secret_key: ${ES_S3_SECRET_KEY}
        role_arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/backup-role

  schedules:
    daily-snapshot:
      schedule:
        period: day
        time_zone: UTC
        hour: 0
        minute: 0
      repository: s3-repo
      name: daily-snapshot-${now/d}

  retention:
    total_size: 10gb
    total_snapshots: 30

snapshot_restore:
  enabled: true
  repositories:
    s3-repo:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: backups-bucket
        region: us-west-2
        access_key: ${ES_S3_ACCESS_KEY}
        secret_key: ${ES_S3_SECRET_KEY}
        role_arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/backup-role

  schedules:
    daily-restore:
      schedule:
        period: day
        time_zone: UTC
        hour: 1
        minute: 0
      repository: s3-repo
      name: daily-restore-${now/d}

security:
  authz:
    roles:
      - name: backup-role
        cluster_permissions:
          - SNAPSHOT
          - RESTORE
